findings: Task 980 completion adds MCS Richness lemmas (mcs_has_large_F_formula, mcs_has_large_P_formula) but does not solve covering lemma
Stage-bounding approach confirmed as mathematically flawed - MCS Richness guarantees witnesses at arbitrary stages
Covering lemma (df_frame_condition_canonical) remains correct path but Phase 2 blocker unchanged
8 reusable lemmas from task 980 identified (G_bot_not_in, F_or_atom_in, etc.)
Task 978 typeclass architecture can proceed independently - axiom disclosure acceptable if proof not completed
Revised plan: focused 2-3 hour covering attempt with evaluation checkpoint
summary.recommendation: Revise plan Phase 2 to focused covering lemma attack. If blocked after 2-3 hours, choose between keeping axiom as documented debt or requesting user review.
summary.key_insight: DF frame condition extraction requires connecting syntactic property (formula membership) to structural property (order covering) - the gap remains open

partial_progress.details: Supplementary research analyzing task 980 impact completed; research-003.md created
